module_info.docstring:
Gateway runner - entry point for messaging platform integrations.

This module provides:
- start_gateway(): Start all configured platform adapters
- GatewayRunner: Main class managing the gateway lifecycle

Usage:
    # Start the gateway
    python -m gateway.run
    
    # Or from CLI
    python cli.py --gateway

classes.name: GatewayRunner
classes.docstring:
Main gateway controller.

Manages the lifecycle of all platform adapters and routes
messages to/from the agent.

methods.name: _flush_memories_before_reset
methods.docstring:
Prompt the agent to save memories/skills before an auto-reset.

Called synchronously by SessionStore before destroying an expired session.
Loads the transcript, gives the agent a real turn with memory + skills
tools, and explicitly asks it to preserve anything worth keeping.

methods.name: _load_prefill_messages
methods.docstring:
Load ephemeral prefill messages from config or env var.

Checks HERMES_PREFILL_MESSAGES_FILE env var first, then falls back to
the prefill_messages_file key in ~/.hermes/config.yaml.
Relative paths are resolved from ~/.hermes/.

methods.name: _load_ephemeral_system_prompt
methods.docstring:
Load ephemeral system prompt from config or env var.

Checks HERMES_EPHEMERAL_SYSTEM_PROMPT env var first, then falls back to
agent.system_prompt in ~/.hermes/config.yaml.

methods.name: _load_reasoning_config
methods.docstring:
Load reasoning effort from config or env var.

Checks HERMES_REASONING_EFFORT env var first, then agent.reasoning_effort
in config.yaml. Valid: "xhigh", "high", "medium", "low", "minimal", "none".
Returns None to use default (xhigh).

methods.name: _load_provider_routing
methods.docstring: Load OpenRouter provider routing preferences from config.yaml.

methods.name: start
methods.docstring:
Start the gateway and all configured platform adapters.

Returns True if at least one adapter connected successfully.

methods.name: stop
methods.docstring: Stop the gateway and disconnect all adapters.

methods.name: wait_for_shutdown
methods.docstring: Wait for shutdown signal.

methods.name: _create_adapter
methods.docstring: Create the appropriate adapter for a platform.

methods.name: _is_user_authorized
methods.docstring:
Check if a user is authorized to use the bot.

Checks in order:
1. Per-platform allow-all flag (e.g., DISCORD_ALLOW_ALL_USERS=true)
2. Environment variable allowlists (TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS, etc.)
3. DM pairing approved list
4. Global allow-all (GATEWAY_ALLOW_ALL_USERS=true)
5. Default: deny

methods.name: _handle_message
methods.docstring:
Handle an incoming message from any platform.

This is the core message processing pipeline:
1. Check user authorization
2. Check for commands (/new, /reset, etc.)
3. Check for running agent and interrupt if needed
4. Get or create session
5. Build context for agent
6. Run agent conversation
7. Return response

methods.name: _handle_reset_command
methods.docstring: Handle /new or /reset command.

methods.name: _handle_status_command
methods.docstring: Handle /status command.

methods.name: _handle_stop_command
methods.docstring: Handle /stop command - interrupt a running agent.

methods.name: _handle_help_command
methods.docstring: Handle /help command - list available commands.

methods.name: _handle_model_command
methods.docstring: Handle /model command - show or change the current model.

methods.name: _handle_personality_command
methods.docstring: Handle /personality command - list or set a personality.

methods.name: _handle_retry_command
methods.docstring: Handle /retry command - re-send the last user message.

methods.name: _handle_undo_command
methods.docstring: Handle /undo command - remove the last user/assistant exchange.

methods.name: _handle_set_home_command
methods.docstring: Handle /sethome command -- set the current chat as the platform's home channel.

methods.name: _handle_compress_command
methods.docstring: Handle /compress command -- manually compress conversation context.

methods.name: _handle_usage_command
methods.docstring: Handle /usage command -- show token usage for the session's last agent run.

methods.name: _set_session_env
methods.docstring: Set environment variables for the current session.

methods.name: _clear_session_env
methods.docstring: Clear session environment variables.

methods.name: _enrich_message_with_vision
methods.docstring:
Auto-analyze user-attached images with the vision tool and prepend
the descriptions to the message text.

Each image is analyzed with a general-purpose prompt.  The resulting
description *and* the local cache path are injected so the model can:
  1. Immediately understand what the user sent (no extra tool call).
  2. Re-examine the image with vision_analyze if it needs more detail.

Args:
    user_text:   The user's original caption / message text.
    image_paths: List of local file paths to cached images.

Returns:
    The enriched message string with vision descriptions prepended.

methods.name: _enrich_message_with_transcription
methods.docstring:
Auto-transcribe user voice/audio messages using OpenAI Whisper API
and prepend the transcript to the message text.

Args:
    user_text:   The user's original caption / message text.
    audio_paths: List of local file paths to cached audio files.

Returns:
    The enriched message string with transcriptions prepended.

methods.name: _run_process_watcher
methods.docstring:
Periodically check a background process and push updates to the user.

Runs as an asyncio task. Stays silent when nothing changed.
Auto-removes when the process exits or is killed.

methods.name: _run_agent
methods.docstring:
Run the agent with the given message and context.

Returns the full result dict from run_conversation, including:
  - "final_response": str (the text to send back)
  - "messages": list (full conversation including tool calls)
  - "api_calls": int
  - "completed": bool

This is run in a thread pool to not block the event loop.
Supports interruption via new messages.

functions.name: _resolve_runtime_agent_kwargs
functions.docstring: Resolve provider credentials for gateway-created AIAgent instances.

functions.name: _start_cron_ticker
functions.docstring:
Background thread that ticks the cron scheduler at a regular interval.

Runs inside the gateway process so cronjobs fire automatically without
needing a separate `hermes cron daemon` or system cron entry.

Also refreshes the channel directory every 5 minutes and prunes the
image/audio/document cache once per hour.

functions.name: start_gateway
functions.docstring:
Start the gateway and run until interrupted.

This is the main entry point for running the gateway.
Returns True if the gateway ran successfully, False if it failed to start.
A False return causes a non-zero exit code so systemd can auto-restart.

functions.name: main
functions.docstring: CLI entry point for the gateway.
